title: BambixLand
description: This modpack is made to play on the server BambiLand. This amateur made modpack is centered around create and RP mods. The aim of the pack is to play with friends and to develop your own story!
body:
---
### THIS PROJECT IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT

Minecraft: 1.18.2 | 1.20.1  
Launcher: Fabric_v1.4.10

---

### Our vision of the modpack:

This is a relatively small modpack, based around the CREATE mod. It features many ambiance mods to improve the environment of the world you'll be playing in (sounds physic, better sound for bloc interaction). Also has a few RolePlay mods such as small ship and Farmer's Delight, these are meant to give you a better experience while evolving in the world. Try to give yourself some challenge by keeping the food diversified and the transportation closer to reality.

We encourage you to play in a large biome world to increase the challenge of gathering specific ressources for your farms and exploring all the biomes ! 

Finally this modpack is meant to be enjoyed with friends or alone and have a balanced world between, builds, tech and exploration ! (but in the end you choose how you want to play). 

---

### Our story:

We created this modpack with one goal in mind, create a server that wouldn't close in a month after everybody did the classic minecraft adventure and got bored. In our world we emphasised the commerce between players and connection between every body's build and center city. The modpack will probably evolve with more and more advanced technologies, following the progress of people's industries and farm. So you can expect more tech mods in the future ! 

---

### Mod list: 

TECH:

Create - mechanical modpack to create assembly chain and trains
CC-restitched - computers in minecraft to develop and manage your factories 



Build & RP:

Farmers Delight - new crops and food receipe   
Chisel - new and variation of blocks for building  
Macaw's suite (doors, fences, roofs, windows)  
Small Ships - to improve ocean travelling and creating a bit of RP in the world  

## Credits:
Small Ships - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-ships](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-ships)  
Macaw's Roof - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs)  
Macaw's Furniture - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture)  
Macaw's Windows - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows)  
Macaw's Doors - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)  

---

We hope you will enjoy this modpack and it's evolution over the next versions. 

We happily take recommendation to add new mods !

All the mods used in here were NOT made by me and all rights on the specific mods goes to their creators.
